Name: 1) Average time for Accepted + Wait - Vendor across all process variants where it occurs
Metric: The average of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait - Vendor and the end of the case

Name: 2) Total time spent in Accepted + Wait - Vendor compared to the total time of Completed + In Call within the same cases
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call occurs

Name: 3) Minimum time for Accepted + Wait - Vendor in variants that also include Completed + In Call
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity Accepted + Wait - Vendor and the end of the case

Name: 4) Average time from Accepted + Wait - Vendor to Completed + Resolved
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: 5) Average time between Queued + Awaiting Assignment and Accepted + Wait - Vendor
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor'

Name: 6) Total time from Accepted + In Progress to Accepted + Wait - Vendor grouped by country
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor'

Name: 7) Elapsed time between Accepted + Wait - Vendor and the next occurrence of Accepted + In Progress
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor' and activity 'Accepted + In Progress'

Name: 8) Time of Accepted + Wait - Vendor in variants that do not contain Completed + In Call versus those that do
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor' and the end of case where activity 'Completed + In Call does not occur

Name: 9) Average time it takes Accepted + Wait - Vendor to be followed by Completed + Resolved, specifically in high-impact cases
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: 10) Minimum time from Accepted + Wait - Vendor to Completed + Closed when Completed + In Call is absent in the trace
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor' and activity 'Completed + Closed'

Name: 11) Total waiting time to the Accepted + Wait - Vendor after Queued + Awaiting Assignment
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor'

Name: 12) Average cycle time of Accepted + Wait - Vendor when preceded by Accepted + Assigned
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Assigned' and activity 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor'

Name: 13) Time from Accepted + Wait - Vendor to Completed + In Call in traces where both activities occur
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor' and activity 'Completed + In Call'

Name: 14) Total time for Accepted + Wait - Vendor in variants starting with Queued + Awaiting Assignment versus those starting with Accepted + In Progress
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor'

Name: 15) Elapsed time between Accepted + Wait - Vendor and Completed + Resolved grouped by product
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor' and activity 'Completed + Resolved'

Name: 16) Average time until Accepted + Wait - Vendor is performed after the first Accepted + In Progress in the case
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + In Progress' and activity 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor'

Name: 17) Minimum time it takes Accepted + Wait - Vendor after the execution of Queued + Awaiting Assignment in Brazil-based cases
Metric: The minimum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor'

Name: 18) Time of Accepted + Wait - Vendor compared to the duration of Accepted + Wait - User within identical process variants
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor' and the end of case where activity 'Accepted + Wait - User occurs

Name: 19) Total time from case start to Accepted + Wait - Vendor in variants that eventually reach Completed + In Call
Metric: The sum of the duration between activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment' and activity 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor'

Name: 20) Average time for Accepted + Wait - Vendor when the case includes more than one occurrence of Queued + Awaiting Assignment
Metric: The average of the duration between activity 'Accepted + Wait - Vendor' and the end of case where activity 'Queued + Awaiting Assignment occurs
